$comment: This schema is normatively defined in docs/aip-spec.md Section 4.2. Do not modify this file without updating the RFC document accordingly.
title: AIP Core Identity Object
description: The persistent identity record for an AIP agent. Defined in AIP-CORE-v0.1 §3.4. Signing order for previous_key_signature: (aid, name, type, model, created_at, version, public_key, previous_key_signature) with previous_key_signature set to empty string during signing.

aid.description: W3C DID-conformant Agent Identity. MUST match did:aip ABNF defined in AIP-CORE-v0.1 §3.2. Format: did:aip:<namespace>:<32-hex-chars>. Both namespace and unique-id MUST be lowercase only.

name.description: Human-readable agent name. MUST NOT be used as a unique identifier — the aid field is the only stable identity.

type.description: Agent type. MUST exactly match the namespace component of the agent's aid. Registered values: personal, enterprise, service, ephemeral, orchestrator. Community namespaces registered in the AIP Namespace Registry are also valid. Implementations receiving an unrecognised type SHOULD treat the agent as type 'service' and MUST log a warning.

model.description: The AI model backing this agent. Recorded for transparency and auditability.

provider.description: Name or identifier of the model provider (e.g., 'anthropic', 'openai', 'mistral'). MUST NOT be empty.

model_id.description: Model identifier as defined by the provider (e.g., 'claude-sonnet-4-6', 'gpt-4o'). MUST NOT be empty.

attestation_hash.description: OPTIONAL. SHA-256 hash of the model binary or version manifest, prefixed with 'sha256:'. Used for verifiable model pinning in high-assurance deployments.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of agent creation. Set at initial registration and MUST NOT be modified thereafter (immutable field).

version.description: Monotonically increasing version counter. Starts at 1 on initial registration. MUST increment by exactly 1 on each key rotation. No other field changes are permitted — the only valid reason to increment version is key rotation.

public_key.description: The agent's current public key in JWK format per RFC 7517. MUST be an Ed25519 key (kty=OKP, crv=Ed25519) per RFC 8037. This is the mandatory-to-implement key type; ES256 and RS256 are optional suites handled separately.

kty.description: Key type. MUST be OKP for Ed25519 per RFC 8037.

x.description: Base64url-encoded public key bytes (32 bytes encodes to exactly 43 base64url characters with no padding). Case-sensitive.

kid.description: Key ID — a DID URL fragment uniquely identifying this key version. Format: <aid>#key-<n> where n starts at 1 and increments by 1 on each rotation. #key-0 is not valid. Must exactly match the kid in Credential Token headers signed by this key.

previous_key_signature.description: OPTIONAL on initial registration (version=1). REQUIRED on key rotation (version>=2). Base64url-encoded EdDSA signature proving continuity of identity across key rotation. Computed by: serialise this Core Identity Object to JSON in canonical field order (aid, name, type, model, created_at, version, public_key, previous_key_signature) with previous_key_signature set to empty string '', then sign with the retiring private key. Verifiers retrieve the key at version-1 from /v1/agents/{aid}/public-key/{key-id} to verify.
REQUIRED for version >= 2. Must be a non-empty base64url string.

$comment: Canonical signing field order for previous_key_signature: aid, name, type, model, created_at, version, public_key, previous_key_signature (set to '' during signing). See AIP-CORE-v0.1 §3.4 and AIP-SECURITY-v0.1 §6.2.
